commands.review_summary:
The PR changes four cask `depends_on macos:` declarations from comparison strings to release symbols for blackbar, codexbar, repobar, and trimmy.

Reproducibility: no. this review did not reproduce the warning through a real Homebrew invocation. Source inspection confirms the four comparison-string requirements on current main, so the reported cleanup is source-reproducible but still needs after-fix proof.
